guide:
## Anu Village Pet Quest

To log the quest you must have 150 faction with Anu Village.  You can raise this faction by killing Tenacious Frost Giants just past the North Gate.  This quest will require two to three groups to complete.

1. Talk to Ulfar Styrkarson who is in a building with 2 guards in front of building.  He sends you Anu Village (N) to the lake where the Ice Tomb is, north of Anu.  You will get a popup on the south edge of the lake.  Return to Ulfar.
2. Ulfar sends you to Vargilder Souralld Anu Village (SW).  He is in a small tent there across of the frozen lake.
3. Vargilder Souralld sends you to Varchief Steinoff in Anu Village (N).  Varchief sometime roams around the village.  Sometimes he is in the middle of the three houses in a row.
4. Varchief Steinoff sends you to Head Engineer Silos at the observatory NE of Anu Village in the (E) part of the zone.
5. Silos sends you to Demolitionist Osbit in Snafizer's House (S) near the observatory.  Buy 2 sticks of dynamite at a cost of 10,000.  Be sure to have the tunar before you get there!
6. Return to Varchief.
7. Varchief sends you to kill two NPCs and blow up their excavation sites.
* Warlord Treg
Cons red in Snowblind Plains(SE).  He's located west from Anu village on a big hill surrounded by Frosteyes.  There will be a con that is the Orc Excavation Site.  Kill Warlord Tregg and then con the Orc Excavation Site and talk to it which blows it up!

**Note:** If your group is wiped out by Treeg, try again.  You may have to leave the zone and come back again to respawn him.  Treeg has a short despawn and he camps the body of the last person he killed.  You will need a very strong kill-group and a few outside damage dealers.

* Prophet Olvadr Korsk
Cons red in Snowblind Plains(W), which is westish from Treeg at a dark tower.  There will be a con that is the Ice Giant Excavation Site.  Kill Prophet Olvadr Korskr and then then con the Ice Giant Excavation Site and talk to it which blows it up!

**Note:** If your group is wiped out by the Olvadr, try again, and you may have to leave the zone and come back again to respawn him.  Olvadr has a short despawn!  You will need a very strong kill-group and a few outside damage dealers, also a backup healer, and possibly a backup tank.  Tough fight and he camps the body of the last person he killed.  He is a heavy hitter, 2k+ critical, 2k Aoe.

8. Return to Varchief Steinoff, collect your reward.

Reward
15 million exp
Casters:  Ice Totem, 30 charges, casts 'Ice Shell' on you.  Gives devensive mods when the buff is on you, drastically reducing melee damage taken.
Melee:  Frozen Throwing Knife, 500 charges, casts 5 knives.
Healer:  30 charge stone, casts Mammoth Guardian, level 44 familiar.
Tank:  Level 50 seconday spear, casts a level 40 The Howler white wolf pet that dies when he procs.

All of the items above can be recharged by returning to Ulfar who sends you to pick up supplies for the recharge.
